company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a public (shared/free) email service provider. It offers email addresses under the punkproof.com domain to the general public. It is not a company-specific or private domain — anyone can register an email address there.
company.raw_notes: Homepage explicitly identifies itself as a 'public email service.' States its primary goal is spam prevention and maintaining a safe/secure environment. Prohibits illegal activities. Does not allow sending messages to the internet (unusual restriction, possibly an inbound-only or internal service). Requests that its domain not be blocklisted, clarifying it is 'not a throwaway email service' and emails will not bounce. Advises platforms with user registration issues to ban by IP rather than domain. Provides abuse reporting via a ticket system. There is no indication of a real business, product, startup, or commercial organization behind this domain beyond the email hosting itself.
